<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after 17 actions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
green_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"Green blocks: {green_count}")

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Character position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Character: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print(f"\nlast_action_result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
